## Summary
Provide a clear description of the pull request's purpose and scope.

## Changes
- List specific backend changes (e.g., connector updates, endpoints).
- List specific frontend changes (e.g., view designs, components).
- Mention any configuration changes in the root `.env.example`.

## Testing
Describe the verification steps performed:
- [ ] Backend tests passing (`npm test` / validation runs)
- [ ] Frontend lint passing (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Multi-container Docker startup works locally (`docker compose up -d`)
- [ ] SEC API endpoint responses checked

## Screenshots / Layout (if UI changes)
Include screenshots or mockups showing the Light Theme layout consistency.
